name: top-ai-ideas-vscode-extension
description: Top AI Ideas VSCode plugin v1 runtime shell.

topai.apiBaseUrl.description: Top AI Ideas API base URL used by the VSCode extension runtime.

topai.appBaseUrl.description: Top AI Ideas app base URL used by open-link navigation in VSCode runtime.

topai.wsBaseUrl.description: Optional websocket base URL used by the VSCode extension runtime.

topai.sessionToken.description: Session token used as Bearer auth for VSCode extension requests to /api/v1.
